positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic owl perched on a gnarled, mystical branch. The owl has large, knowing eyes and feathered details rendered in thick, linocut-style black ink, accented by subtle shades of deep emerald and burnt gold. The composition should be symmetrical, with the owl centered and filling the frame. Use bold negative space, high contrast, and sharp, graphic lines. The background should be abstract, celestial patterns resembling a watercolor wash of midnight blue and deep violet, giving a mystical, nocturnal glow. The overall aesthetic should be Art Deco meets folklore, suitable for a repeating screen-print pattern or a central chest logo, highly detailed but clean.
